message: Moved OIDC and attestation write permissions from the build/test/package matrix job into a release-only attestation job that downloads the canonical package artifact, and updated the workflow security gate to enforce that split.

Verified build/test/package job now has only contents: read; OIDC and attestation write permissions are isolated to the release/tag-gated attest-package-artifacts job that needs build-test-pack and only downloads/attests canonical package artifacts. Targeted release workflow security check passed.
